title: Gothic
description: Gothic is a modpack focused on adventure and world exploration; it includes 16 bosses, over 150 artifacts, and much more.
body:
### “**Gothic**” is a mod pack focused on adventure, combat and world exploration. 
It includes:

•16 bosses and a bunch of new enemies from various mods, including the most popular ones like: “Cataclysm” and “Bosses of Mass Destruction”

•Over 150 new and unique artifacts from the “Relics”, “Artifacts”, “Enigmatic Legacy”, and “Relics (RPG Series)” mods

•Improved combat mechanics from the Better Combat mod.

•A lot of custom quests to guide you through the modpack

•The skill system from ProjectMMO, which slows down progression, encouraging players to explore more content.

•Enhanced terrain from the Epic Terrain mod, tons of new biomes from the Oh The Biomes We've Gone and Regions Unexplored mods, as well as hundreds of new structures.

•Big content mods like Create and AE2, that help automate many boring tasks.

•A ton of new decorative blocks to help you unleash your creative potential.

•Small visual and gameplay features that enhance the modpack experience a lot.

### Third-party content
-[Stay True by haimcyfly](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/stay-true)

-[PolyLib by creeperhost](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/polylib)
